prompt: Round 2 follow-up on Round 1 clusters. Find only new distinct, evidence-backed issues not already in issues.jsonl.

dimensions.description: Deep-check store-aware MCP contract promises vs actual schemas/services/tests across recall, sections, extract, review, archive, and store tools.
Deep-check related graph frontmatter parsing, store-qualified/bare ids, redirects, include_related, and connect/review generated edges.
Deep-check rc gates, perf gate, doctor counts, coverage gates, scripts, CI docs, and gate labels for stale or misleading contracts.
Deep-check quarantined HTTP/server exports/package metadata/docs/templates for legacy co-located knowledge or removed API references.
